title: Build liquid-glass theme toggle component
description: Faint glassmorphism toggle at top of page. Shows current theme label. Click cycles to next theme. Accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays current theme name (Daylight, Dusk, Nighttime, Morning)
Keyboard focusable; ARIA label for screen readers
Positioned at top (fixed or in header)

steps.details: Create lib/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx. Use useTheme from ThemeContext. Render button with backdrop-blur-md, bg-white/10 or similar. Text: theme label from THEME_LABELS map.
onClick calls cycleTheme from context. Ensure no form submit.
aria-label='Cycle theme (current: Daylight)'. tabIndex 0. role='button' if not button.
Run dev server, click toggle, confirm theme cycles. Test keyboard focus.

technicalNotes: Use shadcn Button if it supports glass styling; otherwise custom
